-- ===== Flowtime Migration aus protokolle.json + audit.json =====
-- Quelle: Drive-Backup vom 2026-05-07

BEGIN;

DO $mig$ DECLARE
  v_shop_id uuid; v_user_id uuid; v_proto_id uuid;
  v_s1_id uuid; v_s2_id uuid;
BEGIN
  SELECT id INTO v_shop_id FROM public.shops WHERE kurz = 'MGR';
  SELECT id INTO v_user_id FROM public.profiles WHERE name = 'Mehdi';
  INSERT INTO public.protokolle (shop_id, datum, erstellt_von, erstellt_am)
    VALUES (v_shop_id, '2026-05-06', v_user_id, '2026-05-06T13:00:48.920Z')
    ON CONFLICT (shop_id, datum) DO UPDATE SET erstellt_von = EXCLUDED.erstellt_von
    RETURNING id INTO v_proto_id;
  -- Schicht 1
  DECLARE v_s1_mit uuid; BEGIN
    SELECT id INTO v_s1_mit FROM public.profiles WHERE name = 'Mehdi';
    INSERT INTO public.schichten (
      protokoll_id, schicht_nr, mitarbeiter_id, zeit_von, zeit_bis,
      kassenstart, kassenstart_manuell, kassenstart_grund, kassenabrechnung,
      beleg_storage_path, guthaben_kundenkarte, offene_auszahlungen, kassenist, kommentar)
    VALUES (
      v_proto_id, 1, v_s1_mit,
      '10:00',
      '17:00',
      1635.2,
      true,
      NULL,
      844.51,
      'data:image/jpeg;base64,
